name: organization-ai
description: Enterprise AI Assistant — 100% On-Premise, Private LLM Chat Portal

scripts.predev: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p = $env:OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL; if (-not $p) { $p = '4' }; $q = $env:OLLAMA_MAX_QUEUE; if (-not $q) { $q = '512' }; [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL', $p, 'Process'); [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('OLLAMA_MAX_QUEUE', $q, 'Process'); if (-not (Get-Process ollama -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { $exe = Get-Command ollama -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; if (-not $exe) { Write-Host 'ERROR: ollama not found in PATH. Install from https://ollama.com'; exit 1 }; $si = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo; $si.FileName = $exe; $si.Arguments = 'serve'; $si.WindowStyle = 'Hidden'; $si.UseShellExecute = $true; [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start($si) | Out-Null; Write-Host \"Ollama started (parallel=$p, queue=$q)\"; Start-Sleep 2 } else { Write-Host 'Ollama already running' }"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
